zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelise de Tosny於大約1064年出生在法國巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉索維勒-維其特時，她的父親Robert de Tosny de Stafford35歲，母親Adelisa de Savona27歲。她於大約1080年與Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1136年之後在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易，埋葬在法國諾門迪艾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tosny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jean Pierre.
Americanized form of any of various surnames ultimately derived from the Latin personal name Antonius (see Anthony ), for example Greek Antoniou and Italian Toni .
French: from the personal name Tony, a pet form of Antonin (from Latin Antoninus, a derivative of Antonius; see Anthony ).

variants.name: Anthony
meanings: English and West Indian (mainly Antigua and Barbuda, Saint Lucia, and Trinidad and Tobago, also Dutch Caribbean): from the personal name Anthony, Latin Antonius, which, with its variants and cognates, is one of the commonest personal names in Europe. Spellings with -h-, which first appear in English in the 16th century and in French (as Anthoine) at about the same time, are due to the erroneous belief that the name derives from Greek anthos ‘flower’. The popularity of the personal name in Christendom is largely due to the cult of the Egyptian hermit Saint Anthony ( AD 251–356), who in his old age gathered a community of hermits around him, and for that reason is regarded by some as the founder of monasticism. It was further increased by the fame of Saint Anthony of Padua (1195–1231), who long enjoyed a great popular cult and who is believed to help people find lost things. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates and derivatives (patronymics) from other languages, for example Greek patronymic Antoniades , Italian Antoni , Polish Antoniewicz , Croatian and Serbian Antonović (see Antonovich ) and Antunović; see also below. The name Anthony is also found among Christians in southern India, but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Antony .

German, Flemish, and French (mainly Alsace): Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from local equivalents of the Latin personal name Antonius, from its genitive form Antoni(i). In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the German, Dutch, French, and Slovak cognates Antoni 1 and Antony 2.
History: John Anthony of Hampstead, Middlesex, England (now part of north London) migrated to Boston, MA, in 1634. By 1640 he had moved to Providence, RI, where his descendants are still established.

nameMeanings.name: Adelise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelise de Tosny was born about 1064, in Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Robert de Tosny de Stafford, was 35 and her mother, Adelisa de Savona, was 27. She married Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk about 1080. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1136, in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Eure, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelise de Tosny est née environ 1064, à Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Robert de Tosny de Stafford, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Adelisa de Savona, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk environ 1080. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1136, à Belvoir, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Eure, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelise de Tosny um 1064 in Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Tosny de Stafford 35 und ihre Mutter Adelisa de Savona 27. Sie hat um 1080 Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1136 in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Eure, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelise de Tosnyが約1064年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサイント-サウベウル-レ-ヴィコムトで生まれた時，父Robert de Tosny de Staffordは35歳，母Adelisa de Savonaは27歳であった。約1080年にRoger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1136年以後にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイルで死去し，フランスノーマンディエウアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelise de Tosny(이)가 대략 1064년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 세인트-소브우-레-빅트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Tosny de Stafford(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelisa de Savona(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1080년 Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1136년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 벨보이르에서 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 우르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelise de Tosny nasceu aproximadamente 1064, em Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert de Tosny de Stafford, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Adelisa de Savona, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk aproximadamente 1080. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1136, em Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Eure, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelise de Tosny родилась около 1064 г. в местности сеинт-саувеур-ле-викомт, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Tosny de Stafford было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelisa de Savona, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk около 1080 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1136 г. в местности белвоир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности эур, норманди, Франция.

Se casó con Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk aproximadamente 1080. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1136, en Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Eure, Normandie, Francia.
